signals.headline: ETH Outpaces BTC for First Time in 2026 on 41% Transaction Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH Outpaces BTC for First Time in 2026 on 41% Transaction Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum transaction activity jumped 41% week-over-week to 3.6 million daily transactions, outpacing Bitcoin amid aligned ETF flows, spot prices, and on-chain data—marking the first such occurrence this year and signaling capital rotation into the broader ecosystem[1]. Elon Musk April 2026 Tweet Count Markets Surge in Volume | NO whale bets or smart money moves reported | LOW confidence**  
Polymarket's Tweet and Tweet Markets categories show high activity on **Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026**, with over $20.7M-$20.8M trading volume across 129-130 markets; the 1120-1159 tweet outcome trades at 20-21% odds, recently shifting from prior snapshots[2][3].
